name: Shakib Mahmud Dipto
title: Lecturer
department: Department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
bio_raw:
Shakib Mahmud Dipto has recently joined the University of Liberal Arts Bangladesh (ULAB) as a Lecturer in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering. He pursued his M.Sc. and B.Sc. in Computer Science and Engineering from Brac University, Bangladesh. Having started his teaching and research career at Brac University in 2021 and working there for over two years, Shakib joined the University of Liberal Arts Bangladesh (ULAB) as a faculty in 2023.
Shakib is a passionate Computer Vision researcher with a background in teaching, evaluating, and engaging with students. He strives to foster curiosity and a thirst for knowledge among my students, empowering them to explore the fascinating world of technology. His research revolves around cutting-edge topics in Computer Vision, Artificial Intelligence and Medical Image Processing.
stated_interests: Computer Vision, Medical Image Processing, Explainable AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning.
